working_on.phase: 🎉 Module COMPLETE. Post-Phase 11: Prisma 7.x adaptation & Deployment ready.
working_on.summary: Phase 11 complete (Security, DB, Docker). Adapted to Prisma 7.x (postgresqlExtensions removed, schema fix). Deployment docs added (Render + Vercel).

recent_changes: Adapted to Prisma 7.x breaking changes (schema + Dockerfile)
Fixed dist/main.js path by excluding prisma.config.ts from build
Added deployment guide for Render (BE) + Vercel (FE) free tier
Phase 11: PromptInjectionGuardPipe, SanitizeInputPipe, 5 DB indexes, Dockerfile upgrade, graceful shutdown.
